name: pnp-sp-dev-spfx-web-parts-react-spo-site-game
title: React SharePoint Online Site Game Web Part
shortDescription: This web part turns any SharePoint site content into a 2D game where players discover lists, libraries, and other users in a fun and engaging way.
longDescription: This web part transforms any SharePoint site content into a 2D game in which the player's aim is to discover lists, libraries (represented as buildings), and their content in a fun and engaging way. The game also shows other users with direct access to the site. It comes with multiple themes to match your unique SharePoint site experience and allows you to discover Microsoft 365 development resources and PnP community resources.

references.name: Build your first SharePoint client-side web part
references.description: Client-side web parts are client-side components that run in the context of a SharePoint page. Client-side web parts can be deployed to SharePoint environments that support the SharePoint Framework. You can also use modern JavaScript web frameworks, tools, and libraries to build them.
